_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: one dose of AAV-K55-GRDC24 significantly suppressed the growth of ST88-14 tumor initially, but a quick rebound was observed after 4 weeks
details: AAV-K55-GRDC24 significantly suppressed tumor growth initially at 10^12 vg dose, but showed quick rebound after 4 weeks
